results.title: Memes Pairing Lionel Messi And Gianni Infantino Spread Like Wildfire Online Amid World Cup Controversies
results.description: Lionel Messi and Gianni Infantino Memes, also known as Lionel Messi and FIFA President Meme, refer to a series of jokes and memes that portray Argentinian football (soccer) star Lionel Messi and FIFA President Gianni Infantino in a romantic relationship or extremely close friendship, usually with heavy exaggeration and absurdity. The memes are based on conspiracy theories that Infantino and FIFA are biased toward Messi and the Argentinian men's national team, rigging matches and tournaments in their favor to help them win. The memes pairing the two largely began appearing online during the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar, which Argentina won, and became more prominent on social media during the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the U.S.
